requirement_topic.en: CONUEE Energy-Efficiency Screening for BESS Auxiliaries and Power Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: BESS 辅助设备和电力设备的 CONUEE 能效筛查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS 輔助設備和電力設備的 CONUEE 能效篩查

summary.en: CONUEE administers Mexican energy-efficiency NOMs. A complete BESS is not generally certified as one energy-efficiency product, but its auxiliary and power equipment may trigger CONUEE-related NOM obligations depending on configuration: transformers, motors, pumps, HVAC, power supplies, lighting, and other covered equipment should be screened against current NOM efficiency scopes before import and installation. Product labels, certificates, and test reports must match the exact model and Mexican voltage/frequency configuration where a NOM applies.
summary.zh: CONUEE 负责墨西哥能效 NOM。完整 BESS 通常不会作为一个能效产品整体认证，但其辅助设备和电力设备可能因配置触发 CONUEE 相关 NOM 义务：变压器、电机、泵、HVAC、电源、照明和其他覆盖设备在进口和安装前应按现行 NOM 能效范围筛查。若适用 NOM，产品标签、证书和测试报告须匹配具体型号以及墨西哥电压/频率配置。
summary.zht: CONUEE 負責墨西哥能效 NOM。完整 BESS 通常不會作為一個能效產品整體認證，但其輔助設備和電力設備可能因配置觸發 CONUEE 相關 NOM 義務：變壓器、電機、泵、HVAC、電源、照明和其他覆蓋設備在進口和安裝前應按現行 NOM 能效範圍篩查。若適用 NOM，產品標籤、證書和測試報告須匹配具體型號以及墨西哥電壓／頻率配置。

standards_or_laws: Applicable NOM-ENER standards for covered equipment
Ley de Transicion Energetica energy-efficiency framework

summary.en: China applies energy-efficiency rules through CEL labels, minimum energy performance standards, and GB standards for covered products such as motors, transformers, air-conditioning, lighting, and power supplies. These may support engineering comparison, but Chinese efficiency labels and GB test reports do not replace Mexican NOM-ENER certificates or labels where Mexico covers the equipment.
summary.zh: 中国通过中国能效标识、最低能效标准和 GB 标准管理电机、变压器、空调、照明、电源等覆盖产品。这些可支持工程比较，但中国能效标识和 GB 测试报告不能替代墨西哥覆盖设备所需的 NOM-ENER 证书或标签。
summary.zht: 中國通過中國能效標識、最低能效標準和 GB 標準管理電機、變壓器、空調、照明、電源等覆蓋產品。這些可支持工程比較，但中國能效標識和 GB 測試報告不能替代墨西哥覆蓋設備所需的 NOM-ENER 證書或標籤。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label rules for covered products
GB 20052 for power transformers where applicable

gap.en: The gap is often missed because BESS teams focus on batteries and inverters. Mexico may require separate energy-efficiency evidence for supporting equipment shipped with the system or procured as part of the project. Each covered model must be checked against current CONUEE NOM scopes, Mexican rated conditions, label language, certificate holder, and customs documentation.
gap.zh: 该差距常被忽视，因为 BESS 团队往往只关注电池和逆变器。墨西哥可能要求随系统发运或作为项目采购的辅助设备单独提供能效证据。每个覆盖型号都须核对现行 CONUEE NOM 范围、墨西哥额定条件、标签语言、证书持有人和海关文件。
gap.zht: 該差距常被忽視，因為 BESS 團隊往往只關注電池和逆變器。墨西哥可能要求隨系統發運或作為項目採購的輔助設備單獨提供能效證據。每個覆蓋型號都須核對現行 CONUEE NOM 範圍、墨西哥額定條件、標籤語言、證書持有人和海關文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where an energy-efficiency NOM covers the auxiliary or power equipment; not a blanket BESS-wide certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only for China covered products; China energy labels do not replace Mexican NOM-ENER duties

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a BESS bill-of-materials energy-efficiency screen before shipment. Transformers, HVAC, motors, pumps, lighting, or power supplies may need CONUEE/NOM-ENER evidence even when the battery system itself is not treated as a single efficiency-regulated product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应建立 BESS 物料清单能效筛查。即便电池系统本身不作为单一能效管制产品处理，变压器、HVAC、电机、泵、照明或电源仍可能需要 CONUEE/NOM-ENER 证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應建立 BESS 物料清單能效篩查。即便電池系統本身不作為單一能效管制產品處理，變壓器、HVAC、電機、泵、照明或電源仍可能需要 CONUEE/NOM-ENER 證據。
